channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Is XPENG Building A Better “Tesla”?
item.description: Last week, reports indicated that Tesla was working on a smaller, more affordable model again. Even though it is reportedly in the initial stages of development, people got excited at the prospect of a more affordable Tesla. The share price was up for the week.

item.title: Tesla's Deliveries Reinforce How It Has Further To Decline
How Tesla Could Become the Most Valuable Company in the World
item.description: It's already worth more than $1 trillion, and if it can capitalize on some exciting growth opportunities, it could have plenty of upside.

item.title: Tesla launches Spring Update 2026 with ‘Hey Grok,’ new Self-Driving app, and more
item.description: Tesla is rolling out its Spring Update 2026 software, bringing over a dozen new features to its fleet. The highlights include a redesigned Self-Driving subscription app, voice-activated Grok, and a long-requested auto-install feature for software updates. The update also adds some fun touches, li...

item.title: Tesla's full self-driving gets Dutch stamp of approval. Now what?
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) full self-driving (FSD) was approved in the Netherlands. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian explains what this approval means for the company.

item.title: Rivian R2 vs Tesla Model Y spotted side-by-side: Detailed size comparison
item.description: New photos of the Rivian R2 parked next to the Tesla Model Y are making the rounds on social media, and they offer a great look at how these two critical electric SUVs actually compare in size. The R2 is shorter in length but noticeably taller, with a boxier, more rugged profile. We decided to di...

item.title: Amazon stock leads 9-day Mag 7 performance, Tesla falls behind
item.description: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a look at megacaps' recent stock performance, including Big Tech names like Amazon (AMZN), Broadcom (AVGO), and Tesla (TSLA).

item.title: Tesla: Don't Worry About Inventory (Rating Upgrade)
Tesla Drivers Must Pass A Quiz To Enable FSD In Europe
item.description: Tesla's Full Self-Driving software is officially available in Europe. The catch? You have to pass a quiz to enable it.

item.title: TSLA's FSD Supervised Gets Dutch Approval, Sets Stage for EU Rollout
item.description: Tesla wins Dutch approval for supervised FSD, paving the way for a broader EU rollout as regulators review bloc-wide clearance.

item.title: Tesla FSD Win In Europe And Compact SUV Revival Reshape Growth Story
item.description: Dutch regulators have approved Tesla’s supervised Full Self Driving (FSD) system, the first such green light in Europe. The approval opens the door for supervised FSD use on Dutch roads and could influence how other European regulators approach similar software. Tesla, NasdaqGS:TSLA, is also revi...

item.title: Gary Black Says Rumored Tesla 'Model Q' Under $30K Could Have 'Huge Upside' Opportunity, But Warns TSLA Lacks Marketing Muscle Needed
item.description: The Future Fund’s managing partner, Gary Black, said on Saturday that Tesla Inc.’s rumored sub-$30,000 electric vehicle from the Elon Musk-led company could have a “huge upside”, but warned that the EV giant lacks the marketing muscle needed to capitalize on it. What's Driving The Model Q Revival...

item.title: Tesla inches one step closer to major European breakthrough
item.description: After a social media pressure campaign and over a million kilometers of safe driving on European roads, Tesla FSD (Supervised) finally has its foot in the door in the EU, with the Netherlands approving its use on highways and city streets. The approval paves the way for Tesla's ultimate goal of ...

item.title: Uber begins early test rides of Lucid Gravity robotaxis equipped with Nuro autonomy systems
item.description: Level 4 autonomous technology expert Nuro shared the latest milestone of a partnership with Uber Technologies and Lucid Motors to develop a fleet of Gravity Robotaxi SUVs. Per the company, a select group of riders has begun test rides in California. more…

item.title: Assessing Tesla (TSLA) Valuation After Recent Share Performance And Conflicting Growth Narratives
item.description: Tesla stock context after recent performance Tesla (TSLA) has drawn fresh attention after recent share moves, including a 1 day return of about 1% and a negative month return, prompting investors to reassess expectations around its electric vehicle and energy businesses. See our latest analysis f...

item.title: Is Rivian Stock A Better Bet Than Tesla?
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) trades at a Price-to-Sales multiple of 12x. Rivian trades at 3.5x trailing revenue.

item.title: Batteries Would Take Tesla To All-Time High
item.description: Tesla’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock hit an all-time high in October 2025. It has collapsed since then. Year to date, it is down 22% against a flat market.

item.title: Tesla: Brutal Sell-Off Opens A Dip-Buying Window
Tesla launches new Model Y interior option
item.description: Tesla has rolled out a striking new interior choice for its best-selling Model Y in China, replacing the long-familiar white cabin with a fresh option: Zen Grey. Produced at Gigafactory Shanghai, the update applies to all five-seat Premium Model Y configurations and started being seen on customer...

item.title: Dear Tesla Fans, This Good News Could Power Tesla's Next Surge
item.description: Tesla Cracks Europe's Self-Driving Code as Netherlands Grants Historic Approval

item.title: Tesla's Full Self-Driving gets Dutch sign-off, paving the way for future European approval
item.description: Tesla overcame a big hurdle in the EU, with the Netherlands becoming the first EU country to approve its Full Self-Driving software. The approval could be an opening to get its crucial growth product in the hands of more customers on the continent.

item.title: Tesla Launches Full Self Driving in Europe. Why the Stock Is Still in a Slump.
item.description: Geopolitics dented autonomous driving news early Monday, leaving Tesla stock struggling to get out of its slump. The moves came after President Donald Trump said the U.S. Navy would blockade the Strait of Hormuz after peace talks with Iran failed to yield a satisfactory deal over the weekend.

item.title: Key evidence disappears from Tesla involved in bizarre crash
item.description: Someone stole a critical piece of evidence from a Tesla Model Y involved in a violent crash in Bergen, Norway — the network card responsible for storing and transmitting crash data to Tesla’s servers. The revelation raises serious questions about the integrity of the investigation into the 2023 c...

item.title: Dutch regulator to seek EU approval for Tesla's self-driving software
item.description: Dutch vehicle authority RDW has notified the European Commission of its plan to seek European Union-wide approval for Tesla's full self-driving software system, the regulator's general manager of type approvals ‌told Reuters on Monday. The system can steer, brake and accelerate under the supervis...

item.title: Tesla Finally Got A Green Light In Europe
item.description: FSD approval marks a long-awaited step

item.title: Tesla Secures First EU Approval for Supervised Self-Driving
item.description: Regulatory milestone supports expansion of autonomous driving in Europe

item.title: A Wall Street analyst rode in a Tesla robotaxi. He revealed 1 problem Elon Musk must overcome.
item.description: Tesla's push into robotaxis won't exactly be absent a few speedbumps.

item.title: Ninepoint Partners Launching Expanded Suite of Single-Stock ETFs
item.description: New TSX listings include leveraged ETFs on NVIDIA, Tesla and Celestica, plus leveraged and non-leveraged ETFs for Constellation SoftwareTORONTO, April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ninepoint Partners LP, one of Canada’s leading independent investment managers, is pleased to announce the launch of ...

item.title: Is the SpaceX IPO Destined to Flop? This Historical Indicator Has a (Thus Far) 100% Success Rate and Offers a Clear Answer.
item.description: One time-tested valuation tool has a knack for forecasting directional moves in public companies on the leading edge of game-changing technologies.

item.title: Palantir Billionaire Peter Thiel Sells 2 Trillion-Dollar AI Stocks, but Wall Street Says It's Time to Buy
item.description: Billionaire entrepreneur Peter Thiel sold his hedge fund's stakes in Tesla and Microsoft during the fourth quarter.

item.title: Tesla’s FSD Is Finally Approved In Europe. Only In The Netherlands Though.
item.description: submitted by /u/Saurta17 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla launches 200mph Model S “Gold” Signature in invite-only purchase
item.description: Tesla has announced a super limited Signature Edition run of 250 Model S Plaid and 100 Model X Plaid units as an invite only purchase in a bid to give its original flagship vehicles a proper send-off. When the Model S first launched in 2012, the first 1,000 units sold were “Signature” editions th...

item.title: Cybercab (with driver) spotted at OKC supercharger!
item.description: submitted by /u/SenseiS222 [link] [comments]

item.title: Prediction: Down 30%, Tesla Stock Is Still Not a Buy Ahead of Its Earnings Later This Month
item.description: Tesla's stock declines may just be the beginning.

item.title: Tesla could crash 60%, JPMorgan warns with 'high caution' — but betting against the 'Musk premium' has burned investors
item.description: JPMorgan analyst just dropped one of the most bearish calls on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares.

item.title: Tesla's Big Rig Could Be a Big Success and Still Disappoint
item.description: Tesla's Semi might be off to a slow start, all things considered, but it's changing minds and has real potential to disrupt an industry.

item.title: SpaceX to land in your 401(k) no matter what. Michael Burry flags retirement savings are 'exit liquidity' for insiders
item.description: A new rule could leave regular investors holding the bag.

item.title: Fsd name changed on older Model 3.
item.description: seems they changed the wording on my Model 3 2020 to no longer say FSD.... wonder why I wonder to prevent Model 3 older owners from complaining when they don't deliver fsd. submitted by /u/IrishDan32 [link] [comments]

item.title: Trump's Tariff Turmoil Topples Ultra-Rich's Wealth — $174B Wiped Out From Fortunes Of World's Top 10 Billionaires, Including Elon Musk, Warren Buffett And Mark Zuckerberg
item.description: The 10 wealthiest individuals in the world, including Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc., have lost $174 billion following President Donald Trump‘s tariff announcement on April 2. On a year-to-date basis, they lost nearly a staggering $350 billion. What Happened: Following Trump’s tariff declaration la...

item.title: Tesla Q1 Preview: It's About To Be Story Time On Wall Street
Here's the Real Reason SpaceX Is Teaming Up With Intel on Terafab
item.description: An Intel blog post highlighted exciting technology SpaceX may need to use.

item.title: Tesla’s FSD Is Finally Approved In Europe. Only Not Everywhere Yet
item.description: The Dutch approval is a milestone for Tesla, but expanding beyond a single market will require more regulatory wins.

item.title: Is SpaceX Really Worth More Than Tesla? Here's the Unvarnished Truth.
item.description: Ultimately, value (like beauty) lies in the eyes of the beholder.

item.title: Tesla’s Compact SUV Plan Tests Balance Between Volume Growth And Autonomy
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) is reported to be reviving plans for a smaller, more affordable electric SUV aimed at the mass market. The model is expected to allow both driverless and human-driven options, with initial production reportedly considered for China and later other regions. This effort follow...

item.title: Tesla FSD in Europe vs. US: It’s not what you think
item.description: On April 10, 2026, the Dutch vehicle authority RDW granted Tesla the first European type approval for Full Self-Driving Supervised, making the Netherlands the first country on the continent to authorize Tesla’s semi-autonomous system for customer use on public roads. As Teslarati reported , the R...

item.title: SpaceX Advances Texas Chip Plant, Eyes Production By End Of 2026: Report
item.description: SpaceX has reportedly initiated equipment installation at its advanced chip packaging facility in Bastrop, Texas. The company aims to begin production by the end of 2026, Reuters reported on Friday, citing sources. The aerospace giant is moving to bring semiconductor processes in-house.

item.title: The Secret to Out-Innovating the Competition: Inside the Tesla Playbook
item.description: Former Tesla President Jon McNeill discusses his new book, The Algorithm: The Hypergrowth Formula That Transformed Tesla, Lululemon, General Motors, and SpaceX.

item.title: Ross Gerber Thinks Tesla's Rumored Affordable Model Is Cybercab With A Steering: 'They'll Say Anything…'
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki thinks that Tesla’s rumored affordable model would be a Cybercab fit with driver inputs. A Cybercab With A Steering Wheel In a post on X on Thursday, Gerber quoted a report by Reuters that shed light on a possible affordable vehicle being developed by the E...

item.title: The 30% Dip in Tesla Rippled Across EV Stocks. These 2 Stocks Are Worth Catching.
item.description: Tesla stock is down big since its December highs.

item.title: Tesla’s troublesome Auto Wipers get a major upgrade
item.description: One of Tesla’s most complained-about features is that of the Auto Wipers, but they have recently received a major upgrade that impacts every vehicle in the company’s fleet, a company executive confirmed. Tesla has quietly deployed a major over-the-air (OTA) update across its entire fleet, impleme...
